name: Honey-Mustard Dressing - I
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the ingredients until well blended.
2. Alternatively, combine all ingredients in a small jar, secure lid, and shake until blended.
Good on salads of mixed bitter greens, such as arugula, chicory, escarole, radicchio, and watercress.
Makes about 1/4 cup.
